text: Hey everyone! Today we're going back to season 1 to do this simple Daenerys style. All you
need are a few small hair elastics. I also put waves in my hair for this to better match
hairs in the show, but I think this would look good on any texture of hair. Start by
picking up a section of hair at the temple on one side of your head, and loosely braid
it using a simple English 3 strand technique, where the left strand goes over the middle,
right strand goes over the middle, and repeat to the ends. Braid in the direction of the
middle of the back of your head, so there's no weird bumps at the braid's root when you
tie it back later.
Tie off with an elastic once you reach the ends. Repeat with a section of hair on the
other side of your temple that's the same size as the first.
Tie these braids together at the lower center of the back of your head with a small elastic.
Once they're secure, release the ties that are holding the ends of each individual braid,
and undo the braids up to the joining elastic.
Find two more sections on either side of your head to braid that are about the same size
as the first two. These sections should come from just below the roots of the upper two.
Braid them to the ends as well and secure with an elastic.
Tie a braid in the center of the back of your head and let it go toward the center
of yourظ
as soon as you can.
Braid the entire braids of the other hair.
Bring these two together now and secure at the level of the nape of your neck.
Once fastened, release the ends of these braids as well and you're all done!
Thank you very much for watching!
If you liked this video, please hit like and share.
If you have questions or comments, don't be afraid to put them below.
And finally, there are many more tutorials like this on my channel, so go check it out!
See you next time!
Bye!
Bye!
Bye!
Bye!
